name: Heaven in a Pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pecans, flour, and margarine. Press into a 9x13 pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
3. Spread cream cheese mixed with icing sugar on the cooled base.
4. Cover with half of the Cool Whip.
5. Cover with mixed puddings (chocolate and vanilla).
6. Cover with the remaining Cool Whip.
7. Sprinkle grated chocolate on top.
